title: Kubernetes rollout already seen
body: Previous run already scanned this k8s rollout note. The current cycle should skip it as unchanged.

candidates.evidence: The k8s rollout was already indexed in the last run.

title: RabbitMQ queue pressure
body: The rmq queue depth spiked after the payment worker retried failed jobs.

candidates.evidence: The rmq queue depth spiked after worker retries.

title: Tracing runbook
body: Use otel traces and service spans to debug slow checkout requests.

candidates.evidence: Use otel traces and service spans to debug checkout latency.

title: PostgreSQL timeout shorthand
body: Customer report says pg timeout during nightly export from the analytics worker.

candidates.evidence: Customer report says pg timeout during nightly export.

title: Generic app page
body: The word app appears on every UI page and should not become a governed alias.

candidates.evidence: The word app appears on every UI page.

title: Changed Kubernetes incident
body: Updated incident note mentions kube rollout and retry loops after a node drain.
previous_body: Old incident note mentioned kube rollout without enough evidence.

candidates.evidence: Updated incident note mentions kube rollout and retry loops.

title: Prometheus alert runbook
body: Check prom alert rules before muting noisy checkout metrics.

candidates.evidence: Check prom alert rules before muting noisy metrics.

title: Loki log stream pressure
body: The lk stream for gateway logs lagged after the deploy.

candidates.evidence: The lk stream for gateway logs lagged after the deploy.

title: Namespace shorthand
body: Support notes use ns to mean a Kubernetes namespace in the payments cluster.

candidates.evidence: Support notes use ns to mean a Kubernetes namespace.

title: Service routing shorthand
body: The runbook says restart the svc after changing the selector.

candidates.evidence: Restart the svc after changing the selector.

title: Redis Sentinel failover
body: On-call notes say redis-sentinel promoted a replica during maintenance.

candidates.evidence: redis-sentinel promoted a replica during maintenance.

title: Redis Cluster shard warning
body: The redis-cluster shard map changed after adding a node.

candidates.evidence: redis-cluster shard map changed after adding a node.

title: SLO burn runbook
body: The SRE runbook says slo burn should page the on-call engineer.

candidates.evidence: slo burn should page the on-call engineer.

title: Elasticsearch shorthand
body: The es indexing latency increased during the evidence refresh.

candidates.evidence: es indexing latency increased during the evidence refresh.

title: Generic error state page
body: The word error appears in every UI state and should not become an alias.

candidates.evidence: The word error appears in every UI state.

title: Generic job wording
body: The word job is used for CI, batch tasks, and user jobs in unrelated contexts.

candidates.evidence: The word job is used across unrelated contexts.

title: Generic API wording
body: The word api appears in endpoint docs for many services and is too broad.

candidates.evidence: The word api appears in many services.

title: Elastic runbook already seen
body: This old elastic runbook was already scanned and should be skipped as unchanged.

candidates.evidence: The elastic runbook was already indexed.

title: Changed PostgreSQL ticket
body: Updated customer note says postgres vacuum lag cleared after index maintenance.
previous_body: Old customer note mentioned postgres but did not include enough context.

candidates.evidence: postgres vacuum lag cleared after index maintenance.

title: K8s idempotent smoke
body: A new incident uses k8s but the alias already maps to kubernetes.

candidates.evidence: The k8s alias already maps to kubernetes.

title: Grafana dashboard hygiene
body: Grafana panels should include namespace, service, and deployment labels.

title: Gateway latency note
body: Gateway latency increased after a config reload but no new terminology was observed.

title: Billing export note
body: Billing export failed once and recovered after retry.

title: RabbitMQ operator runbook
body: RabbitMQ operator restarts should be coordinated with queue drain windows.

title: Cache warmup incident
body: Cache warmup took longer than expected during a deploy.

title: Postmortem template
body: The postmortem template includes customer impact, timeline, and remediation sections.

title: Search timeout note
body: Search timeout was traced to a slow shard relocation.

title: Rollout checklist
body: Rollout checklist covers canary, metrics, logs, and rollback commands.

title: Worker retry note
body: Worker retries increased after a transient broker failure.

title: Alert routing issue
body: Alert routing sent pages to the wrong team for ten minutes.

title: Incident command roles
body: Incident command roles rotate weekly and must be documented in the ticket.

title: UI microcopy
body: Generic UI microcopy uses many common words that should not become aliases.

title: Network packet loss
body: Packet loss occurred between two availability zones.

title: Read replica readonly event
body: Read replica briefly rejected writes during promotion.

title: Secrets rotation
body: Rotate secrets before running production upgrade tasks.

title: Auth token expiration
body: A user token expired during a long-running task.

title: Metrics scrape gap
body: Metrics had a scrape gap during Prometheus restart.

title: Backup verification
body: Backup verification should restore into an isolated database.

title: Queue retry ticket
body: Queue retries were expected during downstream maintenance.

title: Release checklist
body: Release checklist includes smoke tests and migration checks.

title: Log ingestion lag
body: Log ingestion lag delayed debugging but did not require terminology changes.

title: Observability onboarding
body: New team onboarding includes metrics, traces, and logs links.

title: On-call handoff
body: On-call handoff should include active incidents and risky deployments.

title: Deploy rollback
body: Deploy rollback succeeded after an unhealthy canary.

title: Snapshot refresh
body: Runtime snapshot refresh was requested after terminology approval.

title: Index lifecycle
body: Index lifecycle policy rolls older documents to warm storage.

title: Memory pressure
body: Memory pressure on a worker was mitigated by lowering concurrency.

title: Timeout analysis
body: Timeout analysis did not reveal a new alias candidate.

title: Restore drill
body: Restore drills should run monthly against a disposable environment.

title: Marketing copy
body: Marketing copy contains product adjectives that should never become aliases.

title: PG product group planning
body: The pg planning board discussed export ownership, but this is a product group note and not a datastore platform timeout.

title: Page generation timeout
body: The page generation service timed out during export rendering; the shorthand pg here means page generation, not a datastore.

title: Payment gateway timeout
body: The payment gateway timeout looked like pg in a dashboard label, unrelated to database platform.

title: Product goals review
body: PG goals were reviewed by the product group after a customer export request.

title: Print gateway queue
body: The print gateway reported a timeout but has no database platform dependency.

title: Error state dashboard
body: The ES card means error state and tracks generic UI failures, not search platform indexing.

title: Escalation status latency
body: The es field in this escalation status report means escalation status, not a search backend.

title: Employee survey export
body: The employee survey export mentions ES in a people ops context and should not match search platform.

title: Event stream backlog
body: The event stream service had indexing words in its logs but no search platform dependency.

title: Error summary page
body: The error summary page says es latency because the UI card is abbreviated, not because backend indexing failed.

title: Customer service routing
body: The svc abbreviation means customer service routing in the help desk queue, not a orchestrator object.

title: Service desk namespace note
body: Service desk agents used svc and ns labels for queues, unrelated to orchestrator objects.

title: Support center routing
body: The support center service routed tickets after rollout, but it is not a orchestrator service.

title: Nameserver alert
body: NS in this note means nameserver and the alert came from DNS, not a orchestrator namespace.

title: Network segment audit
body: The ns label refers to a network segment in a firewall review, not an orchestrator namespace.

title: Night shift handoff
body: NS means night shift in this staffing handoff and should not be canonicalized to namespace.

title: Background job warning
body: The word job appears in a generic worker note and should remain a blocked noisy alias.

title: Job posting sync
body: Job posting sync retries are recruiting operations, not platform terminology.

title: CI job drain
body: A CI job failed after rollout, but this is not a governed platform alias.

title: API contract review
body: The API contract mentions app and job words but they are generic terms blocked by the stop list.

title: Partner API timeout
body: Partner API timeout contains generic API language and should not become a proposal.

title: Mobile app rollout
body: The app rollout note is product language and should stay outside governed aliases.

title: Web app error
body: The web app error page has generic app/error words and should be blocked as noise.

title: Slow rollout typo
body: The text says slow rollout and typo noise, not service level objective burn.

title: Slogan review
body: The marketing slogan review uses slo as an internal abbreviation unrelated to SRE.

title: License key logs
body: LK means license key in billing logs and should not match logging platform observability docs.

title: Linker warning
body: The lk linker warning appeared after deployment but is unrelated to logging platform logs.

title: Release management queue
body: RMQ is used by release management queue spreadsheet, not message broker.

title: Records management queue
body: The rmq queue in records management is a business workflow queue, not message broker.

title: Redis design naming
body: A design note compares redis-like names but does not discuss cache failover mode or cache shard mode operations.

title: Cache glossary draft
body: The glossary says cache cluster several times but does not describe redis-cluster resharding.

title: Office telemetry dashboard
body: OTel means office telemetry in facilities reports, not tracing platform traces.

title: Old tracker export
body: OTEL appears as an old tracker export label and should not be treated as tracing evidence.

title: Promo alert page
body: Prom means promotion campaign alert and is unrelated to metrics platform metrics.

title: Product metrics dashboard
body: The prom chart tracks product promotions and uses metrics language, not metrics platform.
